articles.title: Trump says Iran will 'work out well:' Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
articles.description: Bitcoin price headed below $72,000 on Iran woes as US president Donald Trump told observes to "sit back and relax" with the ceasefire still absent.

articles.title: U.S. Congress returns as GENIUS comments periods close, jobs report: Crypto Week Ahead
articles.description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting June 1.

articles.title: NYDIG suggests $1.3B IBIT sale was whale exiting directional trade
articles.description: NYDIG’s Greg Cipolaro says a sale below market price and giving up millions of dollars for immediate execution indicates a large directional holder exited a trade on BlackRock’s IBIT last week.

articles.title: Citi predicts the tokenized securities market will grow to $5.5 trillion by 2030
articles.description: Stablecoins alone will generate a demand for up to $1 trillion worth of onchain U.S. Treasury bills and $2.6 trillion for tokenized stocks, said Citi.

articles.title: Whitehat developer unlocks $2 million stuck in a 2016 Ethereum ICO contract for nine years
articles.description: 0xflorent, a security researcher, found an integer-overflow flaw in the HongCoin token sale contract that lets the team unlock funds for 48 original investors. It is the second such recovery he has publicized in eight days.

articles.title: Sui Foundation says ‘major upgrade’ fixed bugs behind three outages
articles.description: The Sui Network's first two outages were caused by bugs introduced in its 1.72 update, while an interim fix deployed to restore the blockchain triggered the third.

articles.title: Crypto exploit losses in May fall 90% over month to $68M: CertiK
articles.description: CertiK says May is the third month so far in 2026 to record crypto losses under $100 million.

articles.title: Cardano Foundation cancels annual conference after failed funding vote
articles.description: Cardano Foundation has failed at its second attempt to secure funding from Cardano’s community to fund its annual conference.

articles.title: XRP drops to $1.32 as sellers overpower exchange outflows
articles.description: XRP hit a 15-week low before stabilizing, with traders watching whether the latest washout turns into a base or another leg lower.

articles.title: Three Sui mainnet halts in 48 hours traced to an upgrade bug by developers
articles.description: The Sui Foundation's post-mortem published Sunday traces all three outages to interactions between a new address-balance feature shipped in the v1.72 release and the network's existing gas and consensus logic.

articles.title: Bitcoin extends slide as spot ETF outflows hit a record while Wall Street rips on AI
articles.description: U.S. spot bitcoin ETFs lost $2.97 billion across 10 trading days through Friday, the longest outflow streak on record. Oil's bounce on the stalled Iran deal added pressure even as global equities hit new highs on the Nvidia and SoftBank AI trade.

articles.title: Aave overhauls listing standards after $230 million rsETH exploit exposed bridge risks
articles.description: An official postmortem traced the exploit to a LayerZero bridge verification failure and outlined a sweeping overhaul of Aave's asset-listing standards as DeFi risks shift beyond smart contract bugs.

articles.title: Wintermute to bring liquidity to booming prediction markets sector
articles.description: Wintermute said it will provide “two-sided markets across event contracts on leading venues,” but did not specify what platforms it was trading on.

articles.title: White hat hacker recovers $2M from faulty 2016 ICO smart contract
articles.description: A white-hat hacker has helped the creators of Hong Coin by showing them how to exploit a flawed admin function on a smart contract and ultimately refund investors after a decade.

articles.title: Coinbase makes a major play for India’s booming $3 billion crypto market with local currency launch
articles.description: Coinbase announces INR rails to make the platform fully accessible to Indian retail traders.

articles.title: US, UK central bankers offer contrary views on stablecoins
articles.description: Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller told a conference on Sunday that stablecoins expand the reach of US policy while the Bank of England’s Megan Greene expects their popularity will soon fade.

articles.title: Strategy's Michael Saylor teases BTC buy with 'working better' tweet
articles.description: Strategy may be set to announce it has resumed buying Bitcoin after pausing in recent weeks as the biggest crypto looks poised to close out the month down more than 3.5%.

articles.title: A massive $1.26 billion sale of BlackRock’s IBIT was likely a rapid exit by a large investor
articles.description: NYDIG, meanwhile, rejected the basis-trade theory, citing the large discount and the lack of an unusual spike in corresponding CME bitcoin futures volume.

articles.title: How the House Financial Services Committee is taking on tokenization: State of Crypto
articles.description: Rep. French Hill, head of the House Financial Services Committee, weighed in on outstanding policy issues in an interview with CoinDesk last month.

articles.title: Kraken ‘plans’ regulated perp contracts as rivals are quick off blocks
articles.description: In the wake of CFTC approval of perpetual futures contracts tied to the spot price of Bitcoin, Kraken expects to offer those to US institutional clients within "the next month."

articles.title: How Stellar became part of DTCC's tokenization push for Wall Street securities onchain
articles.description: Wall Street's clearing giant chose a public blockchain with compliance tools built for regulated assets, Stellar Development Foundation CEO Denelle Dixon said.

articles.title: Bitcoin preps 3% May downside, but US PMI data may boost BTC price
articles.description: Bitcoin faced ending May lower by around 3%, with the possibility of US PMI data giving BTC price action a boost next week.

articles.title: How President Trump’s Immigration Order Will Feed the Stablecoin Economy, Bitcoin ATMs
articles.description: When the Trump family faced pressure from banks, it embraced crypto. Now, immigrants who are in the U.S. illegally face a similar choice.

articles.title: The institutional edge: moomoo targets Wall Street-grade trading tools for retail crypto investors
articles.description: The brokerage giant says the future of investing won’t be defined by asset access alone but by the quality of tools investors get.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Bitcoin's wild days are over — and Trace Mayer says that's a good thing
articles.description: The creator of the Mayer Multiple argues bitcoin’s growing economic substance is compressing volatility and attracting deeper capital.

articles.title: Bitcoin price targets $78K as BTC holders defend 'strongest near-term support'
articles.description: Bitcoin’s bounce from a key holder cost-basis level has improved the case for further upside, with historical data pointing to $101,000 as a potential best-case target.

articles.title: Vietnam proposes allowing SMEs to use digital assets as loan collateral
articles.description: Vietnam’s Ministry of Finance has proposed letting SMEs use digital assets, virtual assets and intellectual property as loan collateral.

articles.title: Cosmos-based Gravity Bridge halts bridge after reported $5.4M exploit
articles.description: Gravity Bridge was drained of roughly $5.4 million in a suspected signing key compromise, prompting validators to halt the bridge while an investigation is underway.

articles.title: Bitcoin sentiment reaches most ‘lopsided positive’ ratio for 2026: Santiment
articles.description: Crypto sentiment platform Santiment warned that the two biggest spikes in social media bullishness around Bitcoin have previously been followed by short-term price pullbacks.

articles.title: Bitcoin dip buyers curb selling but questionable spot, futures volumes highlight weakness
articles.description: Bitcoin dip buyers are present near range lows, and new leveraged longs opened in the zone but the volumes lack the size needed to reverse the downtrend.

articles.title: XRP Ledger's new proposal blocks the flash loan attacks costing DeFi hundreds of millions
articles.description: A draft XRPL amendment notes that flash loan attacks are "structurally impossible" on the network because of how its transactions are built, an architectural quirk that has spared the chain from the exploit class that has cost Ethereum DeFi billions.

articles.title: Bitcoin is at ‘pivotal level’ as $65K downside risk looms: Analyst
articles.description: While Bitcoin is hovering around $73,000, a crypto trader says the current setup is “different from the previous breakdown in February.”

articles.title: Senator Lummis says China will 'write the rules' of new financial era if CLARITY fails
articles.description: The Senate Banking Committee voted to advance the CLARITY Act in May, but it must still pass both chambers of Congress before heading to the president's desk.

articles.title: Circle freezes $12.6M of USDC linked to privacy protocol Zama
articles.description: The $12.6 million in USDC was likely frozen in connection with an ongoing but unrelated civil court case, according to onchain sleuth ZachXBT.

articles.title: SEC sues Texas man over $12.3 million alleged crypto scheme built on fake AI trading bots
articles.description: Fuller allegedly diverted $6.2 million for personal use and $5.5M for Ponzi-like payments; only 3% of funds went to crypto trading.

articles.title: U.S. says it seized about $1 billion in Iranian crypto as pressure campaign expands
articles.description: The seizure, falling under "Operation Economic Fury," aims to restrict Iran's access to overseas revenue, banking networks, and crypto infrastructure.

articles.title: Florida Candidate Liquidates $800K in Bitcoin to Bankroll Congressional Bid
articles.description: A Republican candidate jockeying to represent Florida’s 22nd Congressional District liquidated Bitcoin to help fuel his political bid.

articles.title: SEC charges Texas man with $12.3M crypto fraud using fake AI trading bots

articles.title: What Is an AI Prompt Injection Attack? The Hidden Threat Hijacking Your Chatbots
articles.description: Hackers can hijack ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini with nothing but a sentence. OpenAI says the problem may never be fully solved. Here is what it is, how it works, and how to stay safe.

articles.title: When the market is bad, we build: Inside Binance’s bold 2030 master plan
articles.description: Established crypto firms will merge with traditional finance, but neither Wall Street bankers nor corporate giants will take over the crypto industry, said Binance’s Head of VIP and Institutional, Catherine Chen.

articles.description: The digital asset manager says Hyperliquid is emerging as a blockchain-based financial infrastructure platform with the potential to expand beyond crypto trading and challenge parts of traditional derivatives and exchange markets.

articles.title: XRP ETFs add $35 million as bitcoin and ether funds lost $2 billion in late May
articles.description: From May 20 to May 29, XRP funds took in $35 million while bitcoin and ether ETFs lost roughly $2 billion combined, with Ripple’s earlier reported XRP treasury plan still awaiting confirmation.

articles.title: Bitcoin, ether, XRP, dogecoin lag a nine-week stocks rally as ETF demand cools

articles.title: Bitcoin’s biggest quantum risk may not be wallet keys. An early investor fears something bigger

articles.title: Bitcoin retail sentiment still matters, says Swan Bitcoin CEO

articles.title: Bitcoin dip buyers place $500M in bids as $70K retest looms

articles.title: ‘Extraordinarily unusual’ for CFTC to reverse Gemini settlement deal: Ex-chair

articles.title: 'He’s Full of Shit': JP Morgan's Jamie Dimon Takes Aim at Coinbase CEO Over Clarity Act
